title: charats #2782
definition:
1) to cut, sharpen, decide, decree, determine, maim, move, be
    decisive, be mutilated
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cut, mutilate
        1a2) to sharpen
        1a3) to decide
    1b) (Niphal) to be decisive

    1a) (Qal)

    NASB:  to cut, sharpen, decide
